title: ocotea domatiata
intro: Ocotea domatiata, also known as Cananga or Ylang-Ylang, is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the Lauraceae family. The plant is valued for its essential oil, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ocotea domatiata include stress relief, improved mood, and reduced anxiety, making it a popular ingredient in aromatherapy and herbal remedies. Ocotea domatiata is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, perfumes, and skincare products, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a flavoring agent in some cultures.
